data.title: Bakkt appoints new co-CEO as it moves forward with stablecoin payments plans
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Bakkt appointed Akshay Naheta as co-CEO and established a strategic partnership with Naheta's payment startup Distributed Technologies Research (DTR). The move aims to integrate Bakkt's trading and brokerage platform with DTR's stablecoin-based payment infrastructure.
Through this integration, Bakkt plans to open up new sources of revenue in the field of crypto trading and cross-border payments, subject to regulatory approval. Naheta, a former SoftBank executive with investment experience in Nvidia and ARM, officially joined the Bakkt leadership team today and worked with current CEO Andy Main to promote the company's in-depth layout of blockchain payments. Naheta will also join the Bakkt board of directors.
Bakkt said that DTR's infrastructure helps reduce costs and complexity through APIs, blockchain technology and proprietary routing systems, thereby improving the efficiency of payment systems. This move will bring more profit opportunities to Bakkt.
However, Bakkt's stock price recently fell by more than 18% after it revealed that Bank of America (BAC) and crypto trading app Webull Pay would not renew their partnership agreement. (Coindesk)

data.title: 2015 ICO Ancient Whale Transferred 10,000 ETH and May Sell Again
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Chain analyst @ai_9684xtpa monitored that an ancient whale who held 1 million ETH since the ICO period in 2015 recently transferred 10,000 ETH (about 19.69 million US dollars). It is reported that the whale had transferred 3,000 ETH to the same address a month ago and sold them in batches for a profit of about 6.978 million US dollars. At present, the whale still holds 215,008 ETH in five addresses, worth about 424 million US dollars, and its cost is only 0.31 US dollars per ETH. The market speculates that it may sell in the near future.

data.title: Ethereum Whale Transfers Significant Amount Amid Market Movements
data.description: According to PANews, a notable Ethereum investor, who initially acquired ETH at the ICO price of approximately $0.31 in 2015, has recently transferred 10,000 ETH, valued at around $19.69 million, to the address 0x7d6…841B4. Previously, this investor had sold 3,000 ETH from the same address, earning approximately $6.978 million. Currently, the investor's five addresses collectively hold 215,000 ETH, with an estimated value of $424 million.

data.title: Binance will adjust the ORCAUSDT perpetual contract funding rate settlement frequency
data.description: According to the official announcement, Binance Futures will adjust the funding rate settlement frequency of the USDⓈ-MORCAUSDT perpetual contract from every four hours to every two hours starting from 10:00 (UTC) on March 21, 2025. The specific arrangements are as follows: 2025-03-21 10:00 (UTC) +2.00%/-2.00%, 2025-03-21 12:00 (UTC) +2.00%/-2.00%, 2025-03-21 14:00 (UTC) +2.00%/-2.00%, 2025-03-21 16:00 (UTC) +2.00%/-2.00%. In addition, Binance Futures may take additional protective measures under extreme market conditions, including but not limited to adjusting the maximum leverage value, position value and maintenance margin. (This newsletter is generated by AI)
